name: Polestar: Drift-Aware Cache Calibration and Token Commitment for Efficient Inference of Diffusion LLMs

description: arXiv:2607.14107v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The inference efficiency of diffusion large language models (dLLMs) is constrained by two challenges: bidirectional attention precludes efficient KV-cache reuse, while increasing decoding parallelism with static confidence thresholds can compromise generation quality. We observe that both challenges arise from a shared phenomenon: as tokens are...
author: Mingyu Lee, Akshat Ramachandran, Souvik Kundu, Tushar Krishna
